SELECT x, asin(x) AS arc_sine FROM angles;
SELECT asin(x + 0.1) FROM angles WHERE x > -1.0;
SELECT asin(x) FROM angles WHERE x IN (SELECT x FROM angles WHERE x BETWEEN -1.0 AND 1.0);
CREATE TABLE calculations AS SELECT x, asin(x) AS arc_sine FROM angles;
SELECT c1.x, c2.arc_sine FROM calculations c1 JOIN calculations c2 ON c1.x = -c2.x;
SELECT x, asin(x) FROM angles WHERE asin(x) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.x, a.arc_sine, b.x FROM (SELECT x, asin(x) AS arc_sine FROM angles) a JOIN angles b ON a.arc_sine < b.x WHERE b.x < 1.0;
SELECT (SELECT asin(1.0) + x FROM angles WHERE x = 0.5) AS result;
